nodes.label: AI as knowledge resource for unfamiliar domains
nodes.label_negative: AI for routine or simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to limit my AI use to more complicated situations, rather than laborious tasks

nodes.label: AI as tool for routine legal work
nodes.label_negative: AI as a sole authoritative source for legal matters
nodes.grounding_span: An AI can be helpful with legal questions as a jumping off platform to make sure I'm not overlooking basic legislation

nodes.label: AI for professional communication
nodes.grounding_span: I would use an AI for a different perspective on how to structure an email or overcome an interpersonal obstacle

nodes.label: AI as an external memory aid
nodes.label_negative: AI as a replacement for personal knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I asked the AI to rattle off a list of advice from that book. The AI did this well and I was able to access that information very easily

nodes.label: AI use as due diligence before consulting others
nodes.label_negative: AI use as a substitute for human consultation
nodes.grounding_span: Before turning to a colleague or friend I believe it's my job to do everything I can to do the best work possible

nodes.label: Maintaining independent thinking and verification
nodes.label_negative: Over-reliance on AI without personal oversight
nodes.grounding_span: The final step of the process is always my own independent thinking and I take it upon myself to double check everything

nodes.label: Professional competence
nodes.grounding_span: I will go through my usual process of double checking the legislation myself

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: by the time I write a prompt that covers everything... I would be better off writing it myself

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry that AI could potentially leave me lazy and incapable of solving problems for myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as memory aid
nodes.grounding_span: The AI did this well and I was able to access that information very easily

nodes.label: Concern about AI-induced laziness
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry that AI could potentially leave me lazy and incapable of solving problems for myself

nodes.label: Preference for manual handling of enjoyable tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do most tasks myself

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to limit my AI use to more complicated situations

nodes.label: Independent due diligence before seeking help
nodes.grounding_span: Before turning to a colleague or friend I believe it's my job to do everything I can to do the best work possible

nodes.label: Iterative verification and follow-up
nodes.grounding_span: I will interact with the AI until I have sufficient information to continue on my own. The final step of the process is always my own independent thinking
